task_summaries.task_scope: Measure cardinality and distribution shifts for low cardinality bulk and flag features within evidence refs e8 to e12
Evaluate class-conditioned structural variation in features with strong distributional shifts in evidence refs e8 to e12
Investigate if low cardinality features reflect saturation or measurement limits using evidence refs e23 to e33
Assess how models might reconcile or leverage heterogeneous feature behaviors across evidence refs e8 to e12 and e23 to e33
